text: Now I'll create the email body listing all incident IDs and send the email:

tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input: {"code":"# Create the email body listing all incident IDs\nbody = \"\\n\".join(incident_ids)\nbody"}

tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input: {"code":"# Send the email to oncall@acme.io with subject 'Triage'\nemail.send_email(to=\"oncall@acme.io\", subject=\"Triage\", body=body)"}
